title: Steffan Westcott
text: Home * People * Steffan Westcott Steffan Westcott [1] Steffan Westcott , an English senior software engineer affiliated with the travel management company Click Travel Ltd . [2] , focusing on frameworks for enterprise applications on Amazon Web Services (AWS) using domain-driven design (DDD) [3] . He holds a BA degree in mathematics and computation from Keble College, Oxford in 1993, and brought many innovations into chess programming concerning bitboards .
